## Summary

Describe the purpose of this pull request and what it changes.

## Reason for Change

Explain why this change is being proposed and what problem it addresses.

## Prior Discussion

Link or describe the prior discussion or approval for this change.

> Pull requests submitted without prior discussion may not be reviewed or accepted.

## Scope

List the main files, systems, or areas affected by this change.

## Notes for Review

Include anything reviewers should pay special attention to, such as risks, assumptions, limitations, or unfinished areas.

## Checklist

- [ ] This pull request follows prior discussion or explicit approval
- [ ] The change is limited to the agreed scope
- [ ] I have tested the change as appropriate
- [ ] I have included all relevant review context
